category_sources: source_facts.description says GSmartControl is a graphical user interface for smartctl; official homepage describes it as a hard disk drive and SSD health inspection tool.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and GitHub repository use the display name GSmartControl.
docs_sources: Official GSmartControl homepage includes Usage, Troubleshooting, Supported Hardware, Software Requirements, and other user documentation sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official homepage links to the GitHub project, and the GitHub repository is ashaduri/gsmartcontrol.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions smartctl; official homepage says it queries and controls S.M.A.R.T. data on hard disks and SSDs and provides a graphical interface.
